concept: Harmonious / In Agreement / Forming a Pleasing Whole
description: Forming a pleasing or consistent whole; free from conflict or disagreement. 'Koru' names the quality of harmony—elements working together, parts serving the whole, differences creating beauty.
sound_symbolism: The word comes together. 'Ko' begins with clear distinction, elements defined. Then 'ru' rolls into unity, harmony achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'koru sila' (harmonious community). Related to 'weilo' (balanced) but emphasizes pleasing unity rather than equal distribution.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Harmonious design unified diverse elements—organic forms where every part served the whole.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Harmonious dialogue allows different voices—unity that includes rather than erases difference.
